title: BEL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: BEL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
